document_control.title: XIMA External Psychometric Reviewer Pack
document_control.scope: Full psychometric blueprint, item bank, scoring pipeline, validity evidence, and audit trail documentation for external IO-psychology review.

change_log.summary: Initial assessment design with 4 fields, 21 MC + 2 open per field, cyclic pillar mapping.
Redesigned Drive and Communication pillars with Cognitive Tension methodology. Added freeze guard content-lock.
Enterprise stabilization: telemetry layer, AI governance, evidence ledger, retention policies.
Content-lock hash verification, controlled freeze violation test, storage/RLS hardening.

pillars.definition: Ability to analyze data, decompose complex problems, apply systematic and quantitative reasoning, and evaluate technical solutions.
pillars.boundary: Does NOT measure raw intelligence or IQ. Measures applied analytical behavior in professional contexts.

pillars.definition: Ability to adapt messaging to diverse audiences, navigate conflict, deliver difficult information, and build alignment across stakeholders.
pillars.boundary: Does NOT measure language proficiency or grammar. Measures strategic communication behavior.

pillars.definition: Ability to acquire, validate, and apply domain expertise; evaluate conflicting information sources; and maintain intellectual rigor under uncertainty.
pillars.boundary: Does NOT measure factual recall or educational attainment. Measures epistemic behavior.

pillars.definition: Ability to generate novel solutions under constraints, reframe problems, and navigate trade-offs between innovation and feasibility.
pillars.boundary: Does NOT measure artistic talent. Measures applied creative problem-solving behavior.

pillars.definition: Capacity for sustained learning under friction, self-diagnosis of skill gaps, and deliberate practice. Measures Growth Velocity, not static motivation.
pillars.boundary: Does NOT measure 'grit' rhetoric or self-reported ambition. Measures observable learning behavior under adversity.

construct_model.intended_use: Decision-support tool for professional development and hiring workflows. NOT a clinical diagnostic or standalone hiring filter.

assessment_blueprint.pillar_mapping_rule: Cyclic: q1â†’computational_power, q2â†’communication, q3â†’knowledge, q4â†’creativity, q5â†’drive, q6â†’computational_power, ... q21â†’computational_power. Pattern: pillar = PILLAR_CYCLE[(questionNumber - 1) % 5]
assessment_blueprint.rationale: Ensures equal pillar coverage (5 CP, 4 each for others per 21 questions) with interleaved presentation to reduce pillar-awareness gaming.

mc_scoring.aggregation: Mean of ordinal values per pillar, scaled to 0-100

blending.note: computational_power remains MC-only (deliberate design choice for transparency)

ai_evaluation.prompt_template_version: Logged and hashed (SHA-256) for drift detection
ai_evaluation.evidence_stored: SHA-256 content hash, content length, language, quality label, key reasons, red flags

ximatar_assignment.guest_assignment: Simplified heuristic (if/else based on top-2 pillars)
ximatar_assignment.authenticated_assignment: Full Euclidean distance to all 12 canonical vectors; closest profile wins

claims: Internal construct separation: 5 principal components with PC1 explaining 32.4% of variance (N=5000 synthetic)
Maximum cross-pillar correlation: r=0.34 (CPâ€“Knowledge), below 0.55 risk threshold
All 12 archetypes meet separation targets (>20 pts) and confusion thresholds (<15%)
Social desirability mitigation via Cognitive Tension methodology (no gradient options)
Drive questions constrained to measure Growth Velocity under friction, not static motivation
Content-lock freeze guard prevents unauthorized modification of assessment items
non_claims: No predictive validity claim (requires longitudinal criterion data, Nâ‰¥500)
No IRT calibration (requires Nâ‰¥300 per item for 2PL model)
No clinical diagnostic claim â€” this is a professional development tool
No test-retest reliability data yet (requires repeat assessments at 2-4 week intervals, Nâ‰¥200)
No differential item functioning (DIF) analysis yet (requires Nâ‰¥200 per demographic subgroup)
No convergent/discriminant validity with established instruments (e.g., Big Five, CPI)

required_sample_sizes.predictive_validity: Nâ‰¥500 with criterion measures (job performance, tenure, satisfaction)
required_sample_sizes.dif_analysis: Nâ‰¥200 per demographic subgroup (gender, age, language, field)

fairness.social_desirability_mitigation: All MC options encode 'Cognitive Tension' â€” meaningful trade-offs between two legitimate strategies. No option is universally 'best'. This eliminates gradient-based gaming.
fairness.language_risk: Assessment is delivered in 3 languages (EN/IT/ES). Translation equivalence has NOT been formally tested via back-translation or bilingual sample comparison. This is a known limitation.
fairness.monitoring_plan: Zero-PII telemetry (psychometrics_telemetry table) captures anonymized pillar distributions by locale, field, and ximatar archetype. Automated triggers aggregate quality metrics. 730-day retention with automated cleanup.

freeze_content_lock.mechanism: djb2 hash of deterministic recursive serialization of all assessmentSets content per locale
freeze_content_lock.behavior_production: Throws fatal Error â€” app will not render if hash mismatch
freeze_content_lock.behavior_development: Logs error but does not throw
freeze_content_lock.violation_proof: A single character change shifts the hash (e.g., EN 11ffb15d â†’ d177d48b), triggering FREEZE VIOLATION

ai_governance.no_pii: Input/output summaries are redacted (e.g., 'open_answer:len=342'). No raw text stored.
ai_governance.replay: ai-invocation-replay edge function enables evidence-based replay for drift detection (admin-only, JWT-verified)

evidence_ledger.gdpr_unlinking: subject_profile_id and open_response_id use ON DELETE SET NULL â€” user deletion removes PII links but preserves scoring integrity for system auditing
evidence_ledger.immutable_link: ai_request_id uses ON DELETE RESTRICT â€” AI invocation records cannot be deleted while evidence exists

db_tables_overview.purpose: Stores completed assessment pillar scores, ximatar assignment, and metadata
Individual MC answer values with pillar tag and weight
Open-answer text, rubric scores, field/language metadata
Immutable audit trail for AI evaluations (hashes, no raw text)
Complete AI call metadata: model, prompt hash, latency, status
Zero-PII anonymized assessment metadata for validation
CV-derived pillar vectors and skill summaries
System-wide audit trail (no PII, one-way hashes)

telemetry_functions_overview.name: psychometrics_telemetry INSERT trigger
telemetry_functions_overview.output: Aggregates anonymized pillar distributions, ximatar archetype counts, open-answer quality distributions by locale/field

telemetry_functions_overview.name: get-field-averages
telemetry_functions_overview.output: Returns average pillar scores by professional field for benchmarking

telemetry_functions_overview.name: test-ximatar-patterns
telemetry_functions_overview.output: Validates ximatar assignment distribution and separation metrics

telemetry_functions_overview.name: sentiment-aggregator
telemetry_functions_overview.output: Aggregates company sentiment scores from external sources

completeness_certification.certification: All items are rendered verbatim from runtime i18n source. No abbreviations or summaries.
